10/01/2019
765 GG0170I5_WLK_10_INTRIM_CD GG0170I5_WLK_10_INTRIM_CD GG0170I5 Mobility: Walk 10 Feet (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Walk 10 feet: Once standing, the ability to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor, or similar space. effective 10/01/2019
766 GG0170J5_WLK_50_INTRIM_CD GG0170J5_WLK_50_INTRIM_CD GG0170J5 Mobility: Ability to Walk 50 Feet With Two Turns (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Walk 50 feet with two turns: Once standing, the ability to walk at least 50 feet and make two turns. effective
